task.title: Preserve highlighted code metadata token in HighlightedPre

events.content: Preserve encoded code-fence token on rendered code blocks and add normalized language metadata alongside it: Preserve encoded code-fence token on rendered code blocks and add normalized language metadata alongside it

raw.question: Preserve encoded code-fence token on rendered code blocks and add normalized language metadata alongside it
raw.chosen: Preserve encoded code-fence token on rendered code blocks and add normalized language metadata alongside it
raw.reasoning: CodeGroup and other downstream consumers recover labels and filenames from the rendered code class token, so HighlightedPre must not replace that token when adding syntax-highlighting metadata.

retrospective.summary: Preserved encoded docs code-fence metadata on HighlightedPre output while adding normalized language metadata and regression tests for mixed language classes.
